texto: And they all have pretty children,And the children go to school,And the children go to summer camp,And then to the university,Where they are put in boxesAnd they come out all the same.
explicacao: Citação de Malvina Reynolds sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “And they all have pretty children,And the children go to school,And the children go to summer cam…” articula reflexao, bliss, children em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
